name: Web application testing
instruction: Scan the web surface with SecurityScanner: map content with discover_content/map_surface, then test forms, params, and APIs for injection, IDOR, SSRF, and auth flaws.

name: NFS enumeration
instruction: Enumerate NFS with NFSEnumerator: list exports, propose candidate mounts, report uid_locked files to spoof; mount inside kalibox, never with host sudo.

name: Mail service enumeration
instruction: Enumerate mail services with MailEnumerator: probe SMTP/POP3/IMAP, enumerate users, read accessible mailboxes, and extract secrets from message bodies.

name: CVE correlation
instruction: Correlate every service version banner against known CVEs with correlate_cves; for promising matches run nuclei_scan to confirm exploitability.
